falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, as the prior bottom would be violated rather than held as support

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained fear spike above the August 2024 panic peak would indicate this is not a similar bottoming structure but rather a new, more severe liquidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts by more than -50 basis points (yield curve steepens negatively)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion beyond August 2024 levels would signal credit stress and recession pricing inconsistent with a successful bottom formation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
